svg.title: flatMap then reduce — collapsing category tree to single total
svg.text: Before — one SUV category, 2 models, 3 months each (simplified)
After flatMap — one flat list of 6 months
reduce walks through the list, keeping a running total:

g.text: s=205k + 33k → s=238k ← final answer: SUV made 238k total this year
One clean object. All models, all months collapsed into a single number.
